title: Stage-2 vmax-clamp phantom-qty corrupts the BOOK-ONLY portfolio-kill (LAUNCH BLOCKER)
source: Final pre-launch risk control 2026-06-21 (CEO-requested §14 re-verify + risk gate + rehearsal). Two risk-officer (Opus) passes; second pass BLOCK, confirmed with a focused test through the real stage2_tick+risk_check.
why: stage2_tick records the held leg as qty=<REQUESTED> (live_loop.py ~1420-1423), NOT res.fill_qty. The broker clamps the order to volume_max=100 lots INTERNALLY (ETH 290->100, SOL 6802->1000 base units; BTC fits). The static long-crypto bet then HOLDS (no multi-tick self-heal), so the recorded qty stays at the phantom requested value and is NEVER reconciled to broker truth — and the run_cycle pin (~2218-2226) re-buys the phantom each cycle. _stage2_held_marked_pnl (~602-635) and _stage2_basket_adverse_move (~637-663) both read pos['qty'], so the BOOK-ONLY portfolio-kill (commit c687fae) is contaminated by the P&L on ~$750k of phantom crypto exposure. Validated: a benign +5% crypto rally SPURIOUSLY TRIPS the 1.5% book kill (flattens the FX/metals book on a +$37.7k day); a crypto selloff + real -2% FX book DD is MASKED. Control (clamp disabled) -> 0.000% contamination, proving causation. NOT a §14/red-line risk (real position is SMALLER than recorded -> forced-liquidation safety intact); it corrupts the kill that protects the survival book through R1-R3. Parity is green (both brokers record the phantom identically); the validating test test_stage2_book_only_kill.py:77 uses volume_max=1e12 so the production failure mode was UNTESTED.
value_rationale: Blocks arming the CEO-ratified Stage-2 launch posture (B0182/B0197) tonight 21:00Z. A spurious mid-round flatten of the survival book, or a masked book drawdown, is a material competition risk over the ~5-day live window.
scope: execution/live_loop.py: at stage2_tick entry (~1420-1423) record qty=res.fill_qty (broker-truth filled base units), and set base_qty/avg_price from the actual fill; ensure _stage2_held_marked_pnl, _stage2_basket_adverse_move, and the run_cycle pin all read broker-truth qty.

tests/test_stage2_book_only_kill.py: add a regression with REAL broker-truth volume_max=100 + contract sizes (NOT 1e12) asserting book_daily_loss ~= 0 on a pure crypto rally/selloff while a held bet exists.
Re-rehearse the frozen command + re-run the risk gate after the fix; re-run spec-parity smoke at arm time (live vmax may exceed 100 -> clamp shrinks/disappears).
recommendation: Minimal fix per risk-officer: record qty=res.fill_qty on the entered leg; the held-pnl/guard/pin then become broker-truth-correct with no further change. ~1 line + regression test, well within the ~7h to arm. DO NOT ARM --stage2-lambda 1.5 until this lands, is re-tested, and re-rehearsed.
out_of_scope: The realized-lambda~0.75 strategy question (vmax clamp halves the intended bet) — separate CEO-reserved decision.

history.reason: B0202 kill-fix: entry records BROKER TRUTH (re-read post-order, robust to fill_qty=None) not requested qty; book-only kill + survival guard now read true held qty. PLUS entry iterate-to-target (PhD opt-1, CEO-delegated 2026-06-21) builds the full lambda=1.5 equal-weight under the per-order volume_max clamp, bounded by stage2_max_entry_adds. risk-officer (Opus) = PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, no HIGH; over-deploy proven impossible, no buy-the-dip, bounded termination. Full suite green. Caveats (operator/monitor): confirm live MT5 adapter sets fill_qty on partials + monitor fills.jsonl R1; clock seam (schedule arm=wall-clock, roll=cursor) collapses on live MT5 (no cursor).

kill-switch corruption fixed (broker-truth fill) + entry iterate-to-target deploys the ratified lambda=1.5; reviewed PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, suite green. Remaining items are operator-monitoring (LOW), not code blockers.
